items.title: Google loses final appeal to overturn €4.1 billion EU fine
items.author: Bill Toulas
items.content: <article>Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has dismissed Google's final appeal against a €4.1 billion ($4.7 billion) antitrust fine over the company's use of Android to promote its Chrome browser and search service. [...]</article>

items.title: ConsentFix and ClickFix: How Microsoft 365 Accounts are Hijacked in 3 Seconds
items.author: Sponsored by Huntress Labs
items.content: <article>ConsentFix and ClickFix attacks steal Microsoft 365 tokens in seconds using fake prompts and OAuth flows. Learn how these MFA bypass tactics work and how to defend against them. [...]</article>

items.title: Microsoft fixes bug that removed Copilot buttons in Outlook
items.author: Sergiu Gatlan
items.content: <article>Microsoft has fixed a known issue causing the Copilot Chat or Copilot buttons in Classic Outlook to disappear for Windows users with the Copilot Chat (Basic) license. [...]</article>

items.title: Cisco finally confirms attackers exploiting Unified CM flaw
items.author: Sergiu Gatlan
items.content: <article>Cisco confirmed that attackers are now exploiting a Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) vulnerability patched in early June. [...]</article>

items.title: CISA: Microsoft SharePoint RCE flaw now actively exploited
items.author: Sergiu Gatlan
items.content: <article>CISA warned on Wednesday that attackers have begun exploiting a high-severity Microsoft SharePoint remote code execution vulnerability patched in May. [...]</article>

items.title: Opera rolls out Paste Protect feature to fight ClickFix attacks
items.author: Bill Toulas
items.content: <article>Opera has introduced Paste Protect, a security feature designed to block ClickFix-style attacks that trick users into executing malicious commands through social engineering. [...]</article>

items.title: Alleged Scattered Spider hacker extradited to the United States
items.author: Sergiu Gatlan
items.content: <article>A dual United States and Estonian citizen has been extradited to the U.S. to face charges alleging he was a member of the Scattered Spider hacking collective. [...]</article>

items.title: Medtronic notifies customers impacted by ShinyHunters data breach
items.author: Bill Toulas
items.content: <article>Healthcare device firm Medtronic is notifying affected customers about a data breach that exposed their personal data to an unauthorized third party. [...]</article>

items.title: FortiBleed credential-theft campaign linked to Lynx ransomware
items.author: Lawrence Abrams
items.content: <article>The massive FortiBleed credential theft campaign has been linked to the INC and Lynx ransomware operations, suggesting the stolen Fortinet credentials were intended to fuel future network intrusions. [...]</article>

items.title: Kubota says hackers had month-long access to network systems
items.author: Bill Toulas
items.content: <article>Kubota North America Corporation disclosed that hackers had access to some of its network systems for more than a month earlier this year. [...]</article>

items.title: New ChocoPoC malware targets researchers via trojanized PoC exploits
items.author: Bill Toulas
items.content: <article>Multiple weaponized proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits on GitHub were found delivering a Python-based remote access trojan (RAT) named ChocoPoC that can execute commands and steal sensitive data in a campaign believed to target cybersecurity researchers. [...]</article>

items.title: DHS confirms hackers breached HSIN info-sharing platform
items.author: Lawrence Abrams
items.content: <article>The Department of Homeland Security is investigating a cyberattack that compromised the Homeland Security Information Network (HSIN), a sensitive information-sharing platform used by federal, state, local, and private-sector partners. [...]</article>

items.title: Webinar: Why traditional email security is no longer enough
items.author: BleepingComputer
items.content: <article>Modern phishing, business email compromise, and account takeover attacks increasingly exploit trusted identities and legitimate business workflows, making them harder for traditional email defenses to detect. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help organizations automate detection and response. [...]</article>

items.title: Hackers target Microsoft 365 accounts with 81 million login attempts
items.author: Bill Toulas
items.content: <article>An aggressive password-spraying campaign targeting Microsoft 365 environments generated more than 81 million login attempts over a two-week period. [...]</article>

items.title: Turning Indicators into Intelligence in OpenCTI with Criminal IP
items.author: Sponsored by Criminal IP
items.content: <article>Threat intelligence is only as useful as the context behind it. Criminal IP explains how its integration enriches threat indicators in OpenCTI with risk scoring, infrastructure intelligence, and phishing analysis. [...]</article>
